archiveList.error.text: There was an error loading recordings for this meeting
archiveList.error.tooltip: This recording failed or is expired
archiveList.label: Download recordings
archiveList.loading.subtitle: Wait a few seconds to download your recording
advancedSettings.title: Settings
advancedSettings.general.resetDescriptio: Restore all settings to their default values
advancedSettings.video.bitrate.label: Bitrate
advancedSettings.video.bitrate.descripti: Vonage Video API lets you use bitrate presets or define a custom maximum video bitrate.
advancedSettings.video.customBitrate.des: Set a maximum video bitrate between 5 kbps and 10 Mbps.
advancedSettings.video.codec.label: Codec
advancedSettings.video.codec.description: The SDK automatically selects the best codec based on network conditions and participant capabilities. Changes apply on the next call.
advancedSettings.video.codec.priority.de: Drag and drop to choose the preferred codec order from first to last.
advancedSettings.video.frameRate.label: Frame rate
advancedSettings.video.resolution.label: Resolution
advancedSettings.video.error.resolutionN: The selected resolution is not supported by your device.
advancedSettings.video.error.frameRateNo: The selected frame rate is not supported by your device.
advancedSettings.video.error.bitrateNotS: The selected bitrate could not be applied.
advancedSettings.audio.bitrate.label: Audio bitrate
advancedSettings.audio.bitrate.descripti: Automatically uses the SDK default, or choose custom to define the maximum audio encoding bitrate sent to the session.
advancedSettings.audio.enableDtx.label: Enable Opus DTX
advancedSettings.audio.enableDtx.descrip: When enabled, Opus discontinuous transmission reduces audio bandwidth during silence.
advancedSettings.audio.publisherAudioFal: When enabled, your video stops rendering on other devices during poor network conditions to preserve audio.
advancedSettings.audio.subscriberAudioFa: When enabled, you receive audio-only from other participants during poor network conditions.
advancedSettings.audio.nextCallWarningWa: Changes will take effect when you join the call.
advancedSettings.audio.nextCallWarningMe: Changes will take effect on your next call or after refreshing.
advancedSettings.statistics.collection.e: When enabled, shows the estimated available outbound bandwidth for the local publisher.
backgroundEffects.limit: You have reached the maximum custom images limit
backgroundEffects.title: Video effects
backgroundEffects.invalidFileType: Only JPG, PNG, GIF, or BMP images are allowed.
backgroundEffects.deleteTooltipInUse: You can't remove this background while it's in use

chat.title: Chat

deviceAccessAlert.deniedDeviceMessage: It seems your browser is blocked from accessing your camera and/or microphone. Reset the permission state through your browser's UI.
devices.audio.disabled: Microphone control is disabled in this application
devices.audio.enable: Enable microphone or hold Space to temporarily unmute
devices.select.errorContext: Unable to select {{device}}. Please check your device permissions and try again.
devices.select.accessDenied: Access to the {{device}} was denied. Please check your browser permissions.
devices.select.trackUnavailable: The {{device}} is currently unavailable. Please check your device connection.
devices.video.blur.label: Blur your background
devices.video.camera.switchError: Could not switch to the {{facingMode}} camera

devices.video.camera.noTrackError: The {{facingMode}} camera did not start correctly. Try another camera.
devices.video.camera.noCurrentDeviceErro: No camera is currently selected. Please select a camera first.
devices.video.disabled: Camera control is disabled in this application

feedbackForm.disclaiamer.screenshot: A screenshot will help us better understand the issue. (optional)

mutedAlert.message.muted: Are you talking? Your mic is off. Click on the mic to turn it on.

participants.mute.dialog.content: Mute {{participantName}} for everyone in the call? Only {{participantName}} can unmute themselves.
